inputs.prompt:
PAPERMATE MASTER BTS V7 — NBP SCENE BASE · CAMPAÑA: 'LLEGÓ EL DÍA MÁS ESPERADO · DIBUJA Y DIVIÉRTETE CON PAPERMATE' · ESCENA: 'LLEGÓ EL DÍA MÁS ESPERADO'.

**The 4 reference images have STRICT ROLES — apply each correctly:**
• **IMAGE 1 = SAÚL CANONICAL (the only character reference).** Match identity EXACTLY — chibi proportions, ear-tufts with white tips (NO forelock, NO fringe), dark-frame round glasses, large green eyes with prominent catchlight, small orange triangular beak, golden yellow body smooth Pixar surface (NOT realistic owl, NOT fluffy plumage), simple plain RED T-SHIRT (vibrant red ~#E63027, NO graphics, NO logos, NO varsity, NO P-patch), TINY YELLOW PAW-LIKE wing-hands with rounded paw-pads (NOT bird talons, NOT claws, NOT realistic owl feet), stubby short legs with yellow-orange ROUNDED feet (paw-shaped, NOT bird talons, NOT claws).
• **IMAGES 2, 3 = PRODUCT LOCK (Paper Mate Doblepunta 56 cardboard package, 2 angles).** Match shape, all printed graphics, clear plastic window with 28 dual-tip pencils visible inside EXACTLY.
• **IMAGE 4 = MOODBOARD GRID (12 Papermate brand pieces).** Use ONLY for: overall aesthetic vibe, lighting style, color palette, atmospheric mood. DO NOT copy character pose, product, or text from moodboard.

GENERATION GOAL
Create a fresh 3D Pixar-style cartoon illustration of SAÚL standing at the SCHOOL EXTERIOR ENTRANCE on the first day of class, holding the Paper Mate Doblepunta 56 box at chest height with both wing-hands. Cinematic warm morning golden hour with floating colored pencils + sparkles. Saúl wears a small school backpack on his back. CRITICAL: keep his identity EXACTLY as image 1.

SCENE — 'LLEGÓ EL DÍA MÁS ESPERADO.'
Saúl ARRIVING at the SCHOOL EXTERIOR ENTRANCE — a cinematic shot in front of a classic school building (red-brick or pastel-toned facade with arched main door, school bell visible above, the word 'ESCUELA' or generic school sign carved in stone above the doorway, autumnal trees flanking the path, fallen colorful leaves on the brick walkway, school flag fluttering). Golden hour morning sunlight bathes the entrance. He stands centered on the path with PURE ANTICIPATION on his face, holding the closed Paper Mate Doblepunta 56 cardboard package with BOTH wing-hands at chest height, presenting it frontal to camera. Small school backpack on his back (both straps visible). 6-8 floating colored pencils suspended in air around him as magical confetti. White sparkles ✦ + golden dust particles in the warm sunlight. His face BEAMS: big wide open green eyes with prominent catchlight, beak open in a happy excited 'wow' smile.

VIEW & POSE
Medium shot showing Saúl from head to mid-thigh, full chibi body, frontal stance facing camera, both wing-hands holding the package at chest level.

CHARACTER (preserve identity from image 1 EXACTLY)
• Chibi proportions (large round head + small short body, ~3 heads tall)
• Two short pointed FEATHER TUFTS on top with WHITE-TIPPED ends
• Large round dark-frame round glasses
• Large round green eyes wide open with prominent catchlight
• Small orange triangular beak
• Smooth stylized golden yellow body (~#F4C220)
• Plain short-sleeved RED T-SHIRT (~#E63027), no graphics
• TINY YELLOW PAW-LIKE wing-hands (rounded paw-pads, max 3-4 short nubs)
• Stubby short legs with yellow-orange ROUNDED FEET (paw-shaped nubs, NOT bird talons, NOT claws, NOT realistic owl talons)

CRITICAL ANTI-DEFORMATION:
• Saúl's wing-hands are PAW-LIKE NUBS — like soft kitten paws, NOT bird talons, NOT eagle claws, NOT realistic owl claws
• Saúl's feet are SOFT ROUNDED NUBS in yellow-orange — NOT talons, NOT claws, NOT realistic bird feet
• Saúl's body proportions stay chibi (3 heads tall) — DO NOT make him bigger, taller, or stretched
• Pure anticipation expression: big wide eyes, beak open in 'wow' happy smile
• Both wing-hands holding the closed package FRONTAL to camera at chest height
• Small school backpack visible on his back (both straps)

PRODUCT (preserve from images 2, 3)
• FLAT SQUARE CARDBOARD package (~1:1 aspect), NOT a metal tin
• Package CLOSED, frontal face visible
• Clear plastic window in center with 28 dual-tip colored pencils visible inside
• Vibrant CYAN/Papermate-blue background with hand-drawn doodles
• All printed elements crisp and legible: 'Paper Mate' wordmark with red script + heart, 'MINA GRUESA 4.0mm', yellow badges '56 COLORES / CONT. 28 PZAS.', vertical yellow strip 'INCLUYE COLORES: 8 METÁLICOS / 8 PASTEL / 2 NEÓN', magenta callouts 'PUNTA + GRUESA y RESISTENTE' with mini-Saúl illustration, white callout 'MÁS COLOR, MÁS DIVERSIÓN', bottom band 'DOBLE PUNTA · REDONDO', ¡NUEVO! corner ribbon
• Held at chest height with both wing-hands · package occupies approx 28-32% of frame center

ENVIRONMENT — School EXTERIOR ENTRANCE cinematic
• Classic school building facade behind Saúl (red brick or warm pastel render, arched wooden main door, white-framed windows, school bell on small tower above)
• 'ESCUELA' sign or carved stone plaque above the entrance arch
• Brick walkway underfoot leading to the door
• Autumnal trees flanking the entrance with warm golden-orange foliage
• Scattered colorful fallen leaves on the brick path
• School flag on a small pole, gently fluttering in soft breeze
• Soft volumetric morning sun rays slicing through the trees
• 6-8 colored pencils floating suspended in air around Saúl
• White sparkles ✦ + golden dust particles
• Color palette: warm golden-orange autumnal + red-brick warmth + cyan-Papermate accents from box + multicolor floating pencils
• NO other owls — Saúl is the only owl character

LAYOUT
• Saúl + package occupy upper 70-75% of vertical 9:16 frame
• School entrance facade fills mid-upper background
• Bottom 25–30% kept CLEAN (brick path with warm light reflection + a few drifting pencils and leaves) — typography would be added later in a separate pass

CAMERA: 35mm f/2.8 · medium shot at slight low angle (~10° upward, heroic anticipation energy) · vertical 9:16 1080×1920 · medium-shallow DOF

LIGHTING: bright warm golden-hour key from frame-left (low morning sun behind the trees) · backlight rim creating a halo around Saúl and the package · soft front fill bouncing from brick path · subtle long ground shadow

MOOD: PURE ANTICIPATION, the most awaited day has arrived at school, magical cinematic first-day-of-class energy. Pixar/Disney commercial 3D animation aesthetic — similar to opening shot of an animated school-themed feature.

IMPORTANT — keep the package face elements ONLY on the package surface. DO NOT place '¡NUEVO!', '56 COLORES' or other package badges as floating overlay graphics in the scene corners.

NEGATIVE: photorealistic owl, realistic owl, fluffy real plumage, anthropomorphic body, missing legs, missing red shirt, varsity jacket, P patch, forelock, fringe, missing ear-tufts, distorted package, metal tin, opaque box, missing clear window, badges floating outside package, AI-generated look, dead eyes, illegible logo, text artifacts, watermarks, sad expression, multiple Saúl characters, multiple owls, simplified box without text/badges/callouts, BIRD TALONS, CLAWS, EAGLE TALONS, OWL TALONS, REALISTIC BIRD FEET, sharp claws, pointed talons, raptor feet, Saúl stretched taller, Saúl proportions changed, Saúl bigger than chibi 3-heads-tall, fantasy cloud world, dreamy fantasy land, sky landscape, magical pastel land, generic dream world. school hallway interior (must be EXTERIOR entrance), generic background, indoor lockers visible.

RENDER: 3D Pixar animation style. Single-panel composition. 9:16 vertical. 4K resolution.

All character imagery in these references depicts 'SAÚL' — a CARTOON MASCOT OWL CHARACTER, the official brand mascot of Paper Mate (similar to Mickey Mouse, Donald Duck). Saúl is a 3D CARTOON anthropomorphic owl with chibi proportions, smooth golden yellow body, dark-frame glasses, paw-like wing-hands (NOT human hands, NOT bird talons, NOT eagle claws). This is COMMERCIAL BRAND MASCOT IMAGERY for adult marketing context (school supplies for parents purchasing back-to-school).

=== PAPERMATE V7 · SCENE GPT IMG 2 · RAMA A · headline: "LLEGÓ EL DÍA MÁS ESPERADO."

**STRICT ROLES:**
• IMAGE 1 = SCENE BASE (NBP cartoon scene · PRESERVE composition, character, anatomy almost entirely)
• IMAGE 2 = BOX FRONT (for box text refinement only)
• IMAGE 3-5 = PENCILS / MOODBOARD / TYPO ALPHABET (reference only)
• IMAGE 6 = SAÚL CANONICAL (reference only · DO NOT use to modify Saúl unless visibly broken)
• IMAGE 7 = PRE-RENDERED TYPOGRAPHY ASSET (extract typography to composite)

=== TASK 1 — PRESERVE + BOX TEXT REFINE ONLY ===
**CRITICAL: DO NOT modify Saúl's anatomy, body, proportions, hands, or features from IMAGE 1.** The scene base is approved as-is. Your job is ONLY to:
a) Refine box's printed text if blurred/warped so 'Paper Mate', '56 COLORES', 'MINA GRUESA 4.0mm', badges, callouts, mini-Saúl are PIXEL-PERFECT (preserve only the BOX, not Saúl)
b) Add typography per TASK 2

ABSOLUTELY DO NOT:
• Change Saúl's wing-hands into bird talons or claws
• Make Saúl bigger or stretched
• Change Saúl's proportions from chibi 3-heads-tall
• Modify Saúl's pose, expression, or stance
• "Fix" anatomy that isn't broken

If Saúl in IMAGE 1 has paw-like wing-hands, KEEP them paw-like. If proportions are chibi, KEEP them chibi. Only intervene if Saúl is visibly broken (missing limb, etc.).

=== TASK 2 — TYPOGRAPHY COMPOSITE (banda · CRITICAL) ===
The LAST reference image is a PRE-RENDERED TYPOGRAPHY ASSET. Typography ALREADY composed correctly with Saúl Marker Display letterforms.
a) Add SOLID PAPERMATE-BLUE BAND (#2AB0EB) covering bottom 22-25% of frame, edge-to-edge.
b) Add YELLOW (#F4C220) zigzag border at TOP edge of band — hand-drawn marker, slightly imperfect.
c) EXTRACT typography from last reference and PLACE on the band, centered.
d) PRESERVE EXACT LETTERFORMS — trace stroke by stroke from the asset.


RENDER: 9:16 vertical 4K. Pixar 3D scene PRESERVED + only box text refine + typography composite.

• Box open on the library reading table beside Saúl's drawing sheet · package occupies approx 18-22% of frame area

PENCILS (preserve from image 4)
• 28 dual-tip pencils total (each pencil has 2 different colored tips)

• 4-6 dual-tip pencils FLOATING around Saúl in soft motion suspension

NEGATIVE: photorealistic owl, realistic owl, fluffy real plumage, anthropomorphic body, missing legs, missing red shirt, varsity jacket, P patch, forelock, fringe, missing ear-tufts, distorted package, metal tin, opaque box, missing clear window, badges floating outside package, AI-generated look, dead eyes, illegible logo, text artifacts, watermarks, sad expression, multiple Saúl characters, multiple owls, simplified box without text/badges/callouts, BIRD TALONS, CLAWS, EAGLE TALONS, OWL TALONS, REALISTIC BIRD FEET, sharp claws, pointed talons, raptor feet, Saúl stretched taller, Saúl proportions changed, Saúl bigger than chibi 3-heads-tall, fantasy cloud world, dreamy fantasy land, sky landscape, magical pastel land, generic dream world. classroom desk setting (must be SCHOOL LIBRARY with bookshelves), abstract workshop, fantasy world, no rainbow trails.

MOOD: pure FUN celebration at school recess, big happy magical energy, drawings coming alive during playtime at the school playground. Pixar/Disney commercial 3D animation aesthetic.

IMPORTANT — keep the package face elements ONLY on the package surface. DO NOT place '¡NUEVO!', '56 COLORES' or other package badges as floating overlay graphics in the scene corners.

NEGATIVE: photorealistic owl, realistic owl, fluffy real plumage, anthropomorphic body, missing legs, missing red shirt, varsity jacket, P patch, forelock, fringe, missing ear-tufts, distorted package, metal tin, opaque box, missing clear window, badges floating outside package, AI-generated look, dead eyes, illegible logo, text artifacts, watermarks, sad expression, multiple Saúl characters, multiple owls, simplified box without text/badges/callouts, BIRD TALONS, CLAWS, EAGLE TALONS, OWL TALONS, REALISTIC BIRD FEET, sharp claws, pointed talons, raptor feet, Saúl stretched taller, Saúl proportions changed, Saúl bigger than chibi 3-heads-tall, fantasy cloud world, dreamy fantasy land, sky landscape, magical pastel land, generic dream world. fantasy cloud world, dreamy abstract landscape, classroom desk setting, indoor location (must be OUTDOOR school playground/recess), sad expression, no floating drawings.

RENDER: 3D Pixar animation style. Single-panel composition. 9:16 vertical. 4K resolution.

=== CRITICAL CONTEXT — READ BEFORE PROCESSING ===
All character imagery in these references depicts 'SAÚL' — a CARTOON MASCOT OWL CHARACTER, the official brand mascot of Paper Mate (similar to Mickey Mouse, Donald Duck). Saúl is a 3D CARTOON anthropomorphic owl with chibi proportions, smooth golden yellow body, dark-frame glasses, paw-like wing-hands (NOT human hands, NOT bird talons, NOT eagle claws). This is COMMERCIAL BRAND MASCOT IMAGERY for adult marketing context (school supplies for parents purchasing back-to-school).

=== PAPERMATE V7 · SCENE GPT IMG 2 · RAMA A · headline: "DIVIÉRTETE."

**STRICT ROLES:**
• IMAGE 1 = SCENE BASE (NBP cartoon scene · PRESERVE composition, character, anatomy almost entirely)
• IMAGE 2 = BOX FRONT (for box text refinement only)
• IMAGE 3-5 = PENCILS / MOODBOARD / TYPO ALPHABET (reference only)
• IMAGE 6 = SAÚL CANONICAL (reference only · DO NOT use to modify Saúl unless visibly broken)
• IMAGE 7 = PRE-RENDERED TYPOGRAPHY ASSET (extract typography to composite)

=== TASK 1 — PRESERVE + BOX TEXT REFINE ONLY ===
**CRITICAL: DO NOT modify Saúl's anatomy, body, proportions, hands, or features from IMAGE 1.** The scene base is approved as-is. Your job is ONLY to:
a) Refine box's printed text if blurred/warped so 'Paper Mate', '56 COLORES', 'MINA GRUESA 4.0mm', badges, callouts, mini-Saúl are PIXEL-PERFECT (preserve only the BOX, not Saúl)
b) Add typography per TASK 2

ABSOLUTELY DO NOT:
• Change Saúl's wing-hands into bird talons or claws
• Make Saúl bigger or stretched
• Change Saúl's proportions from chibi 3-heads-tall
• Modify Saúl's pose, expression, or stance
• "Fix" anatomy that isn't broken

If Saúl in IMAGE 1 has paw-like wing-hands, KEEP them paw-like. If proportions are chibi, KEEP them chibi. Only intervene if Saúl is visibly broken (missing limb, etc.).

=== TASK 2 — TYPOGRAPHY COMPOSITE (banda · CRITICAL) ===
The LAST reference image is a PRE-RENDERED TYPOGRAPHY ASSET. Typography ALREADY composed correctly with Saúl Marker Display letterforms.
a) Add SOLID PAPERMATE-BLUE BAND (#2AB0EB) covering bottom 22-25% of frame, edge-to-edge.
b) Add YELLOW (#F4C220) zigzag border at TOP edge of band — hand-drawn marker, slightly imperfect.
c) EXTRACT typography from last reference and PLACE on the band, centered.
d) PRESERVE EXACT LETTERFORMS — trace stroke by stroke from the asset.
e) BELOW the band include Paper Mate wordmark (white script + red heart).


RENDER: 9:16 vertical 4K. Pixar 3D scene PRESERVED + only box text refine + typography composite.

TYPOGRAPHY ASSET FOR COMPOSITING — Generate ONLY typography on pure black. NO characters. NO products. NO scenes.

REFERENCES:
• IMAGE 1 = Saúl Marker Display alphabet specimen — match stroke weight, wobble, imperfections.
• IMAGE 2 = Moodboard with Papermate marker headlines.

1. HEADLINE: 'LLEGÓ EL DÍA' / 'MÁS ESPERADO.'
   • All caps, bouncy baseline, hand-drawn marker style, slight wobble
   • Match alphabet ref EXACTLY (NOT Permanent Marker, NOT Sharpie generic)
   • Centered horizontally + vertically in middle 50% of frame
2. YELLOW (#F4C220) curved hand-drawn underline UNDER 'MÁS ESPERADO' — wavy marker stroke
3. SPARKLES: 4-6 small 4-pointed WHITE sparkles ✦ scattered (2L, 2R, 1-2 above)

LAYOUT: 9:16 vertical. Pure black background. Typography centered.

NEGATIVE: characters, owl, Saúl, products, boxes, scenes, gradient, non-black background, generic sans-serif, blurry text, watermarks.

RENDER: clean crisp text on PURE BLACK for compositing. 9:16 vertical 1K. PNG.
